summary: Production Readiness Pass testing completed. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified Admin Product Approval page and Partner Assigned Work page with logistics partner detection working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_vendor_submission_routes.py: Well-structured CRUD endpoints with proper vendor notification on approve/reject
admin_digest_routes.py: Clean implementation with generate_digest and deliver_digest separation
service_task_routes.py: Category-aware pricing engine (_get_margin_rules, _apply_pricing_engine) correctly prioritizes category-specific rules over defaults
AdminProductApprovalPage.jsx: Proper data-testid attributes, bulk actions, tab navigation, and empty state handling
PartnerAssignedWorkPage.jsx: Correctly detects is_logistics flag and shows delivery-specific columns (Recipient, Delivery Area)
PartnerLayout.jsx: Proper role-based navigation - logistics partners see 'Delivery Operations' nav instead of full catalog nav
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: None - used existing vendor_product_submissions (42 entries: 0 pending, 16 approved, 5 rejected) and category_margin_rules in platform_settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production readiness features verified: (1) Vendor Product Approval - all CRUD endpoints working, bulk approve/reject functional, (2) Category Margin Rules - GET/PUT/preview endpoints working, category-specific margins applied correctly, (3) Weekly Digest - preview and deliver endpoints working, creates notification in DB, (4) Partner Assigned Work - logistics partner detection working, shows delivery-specific UI (Delivery Operations title, Recipient/Delivery Area columns), (5) Partner Layout - logistics partners see simplified nav without catalog items.

vendor_product_approval.ui_verified: Admin Product Approval page renders with stats cards, tabs, table/empty state, bulk actions

category_margin_rules.margin_values_verified: Printing category and logistics category margins calculated correctly

endpoints_tested: GET /api/admin/digest/preview - returns task_pipeline, partner_performance, revenue_flow, alerts
GET /api/partner-portal/assigned-work - returns tasks with is_logistics flag
partner_assigned_work.ui_verified: Partner Assigned Work page shows 'Delivery Operations' title for logistics partners, delivery-specific columns (Recipient, Delivery Area)

partner_layout.ui_verified: Logistics partners see simplified nav: Dashboard, Delivery Operations, My Orders, Settlements (no catalog items)
